MainWindow.messageHelperToolInstall: Ukulawula ama-Fan kwe-Macs kudinga ithuluzi losizo lifakwe. Ungagxila kuphela ekubhekeni ama-fan nezizweli zokushisa uma ufuna kuphela ukubuka.
MainWindow.messageHelperToolUpgrade: Macs Fan Control idinga ukufaka inguqulo entsha yethuluzi losizo lokulawula ama-fan.
MainWindow.messageFanControlNotAvailable: Macs Fan Control ayikwazanga ukuxhuma kuhlelo losizo ukuze ikwazi ukulawula ama-fan nokulungisa izivinini. Qiniseka ukufaka iphasiwedi yomlawuli lapho kucelwa.\n\nUsengasebenzisa uhlelo ngendlela yokubuka kuphela.
MainWindow.messageNoFansAvailable: Lena i-computer ayinazo izivunguvungu futhi ipholiswa ngokwemvelo

FanControlDialog.title: Shintsha ukulawula i-fan '%1'
FanControlDialog.staticIncrease: Izinga lokushisa lapho isivinini se-fan sizoqala ukukhuphuka:
FanControlDialog.statusWarning:
Kukhona okungahambi kahle - amanani we-fan min/max alingana (%1).
Qiniseka ukuthi ususa noma yiluphi uhlelo oluphatha ama-fan bese usetha kabusha i-SMC.

Presets.presetCreateNewMessage: Onke ama-fan akho alawulwa uhlelo njengamanje.\n\nSicela ushintshe ukulawula kube ngokwakho okungenani ku-fan eyodwa ukuze ukwazi ukudala umphumela omusha.
Presets.presetCreateNewMessage2: Sicela ushintshe ukulawula okungenani ku-fan eyodwa njengoba wonke ama-fan eshaya ngokuphelele njengamanje, ehambisana nomphumela '%1' osekhona.

UpgradeToProDialog.title: Thuthukisa ku-Macs Fan Control Pro
UpgradeToProDialog.proInfo1: Inguqulo ye-Pro ikwazi ukudala nokulondoloza imiphumela ye-fan ngokwezifiso ukuze ushintshe ngokushesha kuye ngomsebenzi wakho.
UpgradeToProDialog.proInfo2: Uma usuvele uthenge uhlelo, sicela cindezela inkinobho 'Faka i-License' ngezansi.

EnterLicenseDialog.title: Vula inguqulo ye-Pro
EnterLicenseDialog.infoText: Uma usuvele uthenge Macs Fan Control, faka ikheli lakho le-imeyili kanye ne-License key evela ku-receipt yakho ye-imeyili. Lokhu kuzovula ngokuphelele izici ze-Pro ze-Macs Fan Control.
EnterLicenseDialog.invalidLicenseText: Qiniseka ukuthi zonke izinhlamvu, izinombolo, nama-dashes afakiwe ngendlela efanele. Uma uthayipha ngesandla, zama ukukopisha nokunamathisela ku-receipt yakho ye-imeyili.
EnterLicenseDialog.invalidLicenseMismatchOS: Le License key ivumelekile kodwa ayihloselwe ukusetshenziswa ku %1.
EnterLicenseDialog.thanksTitle: Ngiyabonga ngokuthenga Macs Fan Control Pro
EnterLicenseDialog.thanksInfo: Zonke izithiyo zenguqulo yamahhala sezisusiwe, sithemba ukuthi uyayijabulela!

TrialDialog.messageSecondary: Uhlelo kuphela olungalawula ama-fan kuma-Intel Macs ngaphansi kwe-Windows
TrialDialog.timeLeftDays: You have %1 days remaining of your trial period.
TrialDialog.timeLeftHours: You have %1 hours remaining of your trial period.

PreferencesWindow.title: Izintandokazi (Options)
PreferencesWindow.checkPrecise: Khombisa izinga lokushisa ngokunembile lapho kungenzeka (isib. 45.4)
PreferencesWindow.checkTwoLines: Bonisa izifundo ze-fan/senzwa emigqeni emibili ukuze wonge indawo
